label: B2B marketing ops — implementation evaluator
_validation_rhythm90: Cold home: no momentum + soft scores → no match. Deep first visit: high scroll + concepts + no CTA → may match. Return + pages: match with playbook + si.playbook_match.

output.inferred_need: Figure out how to put this operating model into practice for their team
output.message_angle: Make it practical — reduce change-management friction
output.offer_type: Implementation guide, planning checklist, or starter playbook
output.surface: Inline CTA or soft popup after meaningful engagement
output.timing: After high scroll depth or a second page view
output.recommended_activation_summary: Offer an implementation guide or planning checklist — this visitor appears to be evaluating how to operationalize the framework; surface it inline or as a soft popup.
